testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Discover the experience of those who chose to collaborate with us and transformed their ideas into success stories.

items.name: Sophie Martin
items.content: An exceptional team that understood our needs and delivered a perfectly adapted solution. Their technical expertise and responsiveness made all the difference.

items.name: Mr Talla Endre
items.content: Thanks to them, our mobile application was developed in record time without compromising on quality. An agile and transparent collaboration.

items.name: Marie Laurent
items.content: A robust and scalable backend architecture. Our API handles the load perfectly since launch. True professionalism.

items.name: Pierre Moreau
items.content: Design thinking applied to development: an approach that created a truly intuitive and engaging user interface.

items.name: Claire Bernard
items.content: Our organic traffic increased by 200% in 6 months. Their content strategy and technical optimization exceeded our expectations.

items.name: Alexandre Petit
items.content: The customized training transformed our coding practices. Our team is more efficient and our applications more performant.

about.description: DB DIGITAL AGENCY is a leading digital agency specializing in web development, mobile applications, design, and digital marketing. With years of experience and a team of talented professionals, we help businesses transform their digital presence and achieve their strategic goals.

story.mission: Our mission is to provide world-class digital solutions that exceed expectations. We combine creativity, technical expertise, and strategic thinking to create exceptional experiences for our clients and their users. Every project is an opportunity to redefine excellence.
story.visionText: To become the leading digital partner in Africa and worldwide, constantly pushing the boundaries of innovation and quality.

support.subtitle: A dedicated team to support you 24/7
support.name: Full name
support.subject: Subject

1.question: What are your response times?
1.answer: We respond to all tickets within 24 business hours. Urgent requests are handled within 4 hours.

2.question: How can I track my ticket progress?
2.answer: You can track your ticket in the 'Track ticket' tab with your ticket number and email.

3.question: Do you offer weekend support?
3.answer: Yes, our team is available on Saturdays from 9am to 1pm for emergencies.

4.question: Can I attach files to my ticket?
4.answer: Yes, you can attach up to 5 files (images, documents, logs) with a maximum size of 10MB each.

status.title: Track your ticket
status.info: An email with your ticket number was sent to you upon creation.
